title: RevitParameter
description: RevitParameter: A BHoM wrapper class for a Revit parameter.

Name.description: Name of the Revit parameter as seen in the UI.

UnitType.description: Unit type of the Revit parameter.

IsReadOnly.description: Whether the parameter is read only or modifiable by the Revit user.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
